title: Cavedweller Animations overhaul!
description: This project makes cave dweller animation better and more smooth than the "hard" and goofy animation
body:
This pack focuses on improving the Cave Dweller animations, making them smoother and more natural, without the rigid “hard” movement. The original Cave Dweller model remains unchanged—except for the R##### Version or the upcoming Plus Version.

Plus Version Warning:
Contains partial gore visuals
Loud, sudden sounds
Exclusive animations—this is not a simple reskin or minor tweak. Every animation is altered, and certain aspects of the model are modified for a more disturbing effect, while keeping the core model intact.

All credits to Idk some_guy for the Reimagined version.
And Gargin, the creator of the original Cave Dweller — this pack wouldn't be possible without these awesome creators!

Usage:
All rights reserved. If you wish to use these animations in a modpack or video, please provide proper credit and a link to this page.
